title: Cave beetle

{{Quote|Now, time for the soup. Jabba likes a good beetle broth. He calls it stew, but actually it's broth. We need beetle carcasses. For flavor I'd say about 15. Rock or cave beetles. Either one.|[[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]]|<ref name="SWG:JPP">{{SWGcite|exp=NGE|type=general|Jabba's Palace: Porcellus|Tatooine}}</ref>}}
'''Cave beetles''' were six-legged [[Insect/Legends|insects]] that lived in the [[Cave/Legends|caves]] of [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="SWG" /> The [[Chef/Legends|cook]] [[Porcellus/Legends|Porcellus]] used [[rock beetle]] and cave beetle carcasses to make [[beetle broth]] for his master, [[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba Desilijic Tiure]].<ref name="SWG:JPP" />

==Behind the scenes==
[[File:IDontThinkThisIsADroch.jpg|thumb|right|200px|Tatooine "mite" concept art for ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]''.]]
Cave beetles appeared in the [[2003]] [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars Galaxies]]'', a [[Wikipedia:Massively multiplayer online role-playing game|massively multiplayer online roleplaying game]] developed by [[Sony]] Online Entertainment and published by [[LucasArts]],<ref name="SWG" /> prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].<ref name="Shutdown">{{SonyCite|url=playerinfo|text=IMPORTANT INFORMATION ABOUT ''STAR WARS'' GALAXIES™}}</ref> Cave beetles were almost identical to [[Rockmite/Legends|rockmites]], [[rock beetle]]s, [[Sand beetle/Legends|sand beetles]] and [[Dune beetle/Legends|dune beetles]], using the same base model with different textures.<ref name="SWG" />
